summary: Notification System testing completed successfully. All 13 backend tests passed. All frontend components working correctly including bell icon, dropdown, notification page with tabs (All, Unread, Preferences, SMTP Settings).

integration_issues.issue: Initial WebSocket connection fails with 'WebSocket is closed before connection established' then auto-reconnects successfully. Non-blocking but could improve initial connection handling.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - non-blocking but should be addressed for cleaner console

critical_code_review_comments: Notification System APIs are well implemented with proper authentication
NotificationBell component has WebSocket real-time support with auto-reconnect
SMTP Settings properly excludes password from GET response for security
User preferences properly toggle notification types (task, payroll, leave, inventory, orders)
Admin SMTP tab only visible to admin/manager roles as expected
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created/cleared test notifications during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification System testing complete. All APIs verified: GET /api/notifications, GET /api/notifications/unread-count, PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read, PUT /api/notifications/mark-all-read, DELETE /api/notifications/{id}, DELETE /api/notifications (clear all), GET/PUT /api/notifications/preferences, GET/PUT /api/notifications/smtp-settings, POST /api/notifications/send. Frontend components: NotificationBell dropdown in header, Notifications page with All/Unread/Preferences/SMTP tabs.

Backend APIs.GET /api/notifications: PASS - Returns notifications list with unread_count

Frontend Components.NotificationBell in header: PASS - Bell icon visible, opens dropdown on click
Frontend Components.Notification dropdown: PASS - Shows notifications list, mark all read, view all link
Frontend Components.Notifications page - All tab: PASS - Shows all notifications with empty state
Frontend Components.Notifications page - Unread tab: PASS - Shows unread only with Mark All Read button
Frontend Components.Notifications page - Preferences tab: PASS - In-app, email toggles + notification type toggles
Frontend Components.Notifications page - SMTP Settings tab: PASS - Admin only, shows SMTP form with test email option
